title: CDC HRQOL-4 — Healthy Days core module (health status)
license: US Government public domain (CDC). Core Healthy Days measures; in BRFSS full sample since 1993, also used in NHANES.

provenance.attribution: CDC Health-Related Quality of Life (HRQOL) Healthy Days Core Module (CDC HRQOL-4). Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
provenance.wording_note: Item wording confirmed across multiple public reproductions of the CDC BRFSS module. Standard interviewer coding: Number of days entered directly; None = 88; Don't know/Not sure = 77; Refused = 99.

ru_status: draft_forward_translation — NOT validated. Run TRAPD before use. verbatim_ok=false for RU.
scoring_note: Unhealthy days index = Q2 + Q3, truncated at 30. Healthy days = 30 − unhealthy days. Q4 = activity-limitation days.

items.en: Would you say that in general your health is excellent, very good, good, fair, or poor?
items.ru_draft: В целом вы бы оценили своё здоровье как отличное, очень хорошее, хорошее, удовлетворительное или плохое?
items.note: Self-rated general health; strong single-item proxy for overall HRQOL.

items.en: Now thinking about your physical health, which includes physical illness and injury, for how many days during the past 30 days was your physical health not good?
items.ru_draft: Теперь о вашем физическом здоровье, включая болезни и травмы: сколько дней за последние 30 дней ваше физическое здоровье было не в порядке?
items.response_coding: Number of days (0–30); None = 88; Don't know/Not sure = 77; Refused = 99

items.en: Now thinking about your mental health, which includes stress, depression, and problems with emotions, for how many days during the past 30 days was your mental health not good?
items.ru_draft: Теперь о вашем психическом здоровье, включая стресс, депрессию и эмоциональные проблемы: сколько дней за последние 30 дней ваше психическое здоровье было не в порядке?
items.response_coding: Number of days (0–30); None = 88; Don't know/Not sure = 77; Refused = 99
items.skip: If both Q2 AND Q3 = None, skip Q4.

items.en: During the past 30 days, for about how many days did poor physical or mental health keep you from doing your usual activities, such as self-care, work, or recreation?
items.ru_draft: За последние 30 дней сколько примерно дней плохое физическое или психическое здоровье мешало вам заниматься обычными делами, такими как самообслуживание, работа или отдых?
items.response_coding: Number of days (0–30); None = 88; Don't know/Not sure = 77; Refused = 99
